methods.method_name: Pollen Viability Estimation Using Staining Techniques
methods.description: This method involves using various staining techniques to estimate pollen viability by visualizing specific compounds, contents, or cellular compartments. It is used because it is the fastest and most commonly used method for pollen viability estimation.

steps.description: Use Potassium iodide, aniline blue, and acetocarmine stains to bind to starch, callose, and chromatin, respectively.
steps.searchable_summary: apply specific stains to pollen samples to visualize viability

steps.description: Analyze the stained pollen samples to determine viability based on color presence or absence.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze stained pollen samples to assess viability

methods.method_name: Pollen Viability Estimation Using Digital Holographic Microscopy (DHM)
methods.description: This method assesses pollen viability using Digital Holographic Microscopy (DHM) as a standalone method by comparing distinguishing features among over 30 parameters identified by the DHM technique.

steps.description: Collect 500 individual pollen grains of Lantana camara using DHM.
steps.searchable_summary: collect pollen grain images using DHM

steps.description: Select distinguishing features among over 30 parameters identified by the DHM technique.
steps.searchable_summary: identify distinguishing features in DHM images

steps.description: Compare results with pollen viability assessed by acetocarmine staining.
steps.searchable_summary: validate DHM results with acetocarmine staining

methods.method_name: Quantitative Measurements on Bright-field and Phase Images
methods.description: This method involves recording images of pollen in both bright-field and quantitative phase modes to obtain quantitative measurements for pollen classification.

steps.description: Record images of pollen in both bright-field and quantitative phase modes using DHM.
steps.searchable_summary: capture bright-field and phase images of pollen

steps.description: Use ImageJ to read and process the images to extract 2D and quantitative parameters.
steps.searchable_summary: process images using ImageJ to extract parameters

steps.description: Analyze the probability density of mean phase values and perform statistical tests to classify pollen.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze phase values and perform statistical tests
